title: adenocarpus commutatus
intro: Adenocarpus commutatus, also known as the Portuguese oak or Adenocarpus, is a small tree or shrub native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Adenocarpus commutatus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
